allow: PowerShell($m = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.football-data.org/v4/matches/538147" -Headers @{"X-Auth-Token"="8ae72cabe6b64983aa51a16a2c2fa21d"}; $m | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File "C:\\Users\\tjzha\\match_debug.json" -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "Keys: $\($m.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)"; Write-Output "HomeTeam keys: $\($m.homeTeam.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/teams/57/lineup" -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "Formation: $\($r.formation\)"; Write-Output "Starters: $\($r.starters.Count\)"; Write-Output "Bench: $\($r.bench.Count\)"; Write-Output "First starter: $\($r.starters[0].name\) - $\($r.starters[0].position\) - photo: $\($r.starters[0].photo\)")

PowerShell($s = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.football-data.org/v4/teams/57" -Headers @{"X-Auth-Token"="8ae72cabe6b64983aa51a16a2c2fa21d"} -TimeoutSec 15; $s.squad | Group-Object position | Select-Object Name, Count)

PowerShell($s = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.football-data.org/v4/teams/57" -Headers @{"X-Auth-Token"="8ae72cabe6b64983aa51a16a2c2fa21d"} -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Squad size: $\($s.squad.Count\)"; $s.squad | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.position\): $\($_.name\)" } | Sort-Object)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Formation:', d['formation']\); print\('\\nStarters:'\); [print\(f'  {p[\\"role\\"]}: {p[\\"name\\"]} - photo={bool\(p[\\"photo\\"]\)}'\) for p in d['starters']]; print\('\\nBench:'\); [print\(f'  {p[\\"role\\"]}: {p[\\"name\\"]}'\) for p in d['bench']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d['player'][0]; print\('idPlayer:', p['idPlayer']\); print\('Keys:', list\(p.keys\(\)\)[:20]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('formation:', d['formation'], 'starters:', len\(d['starters']\)\); [print\(' ', p['role'], p['name']\) for p in d['starters']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Barcelona formation:', d['formation'], 'starters:', len\(d['starters']\)\); [print\(' ', p['role'], p['name']\) for p in d['starters']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Bayern formation:', d['formation'], 'starters:', len\(d['starters']\)\); [print\(' ', p['role'], p['name']\) for p in d['starters']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Man City:', d['formation'], len\(d['starters']\), 'starters'\); [print\(' ', p['role'], p['name']\) for p in d['starters']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('PSG:', d['formation'], len\(d['starters']\), 'starters'\); [print\(' ', p['role'], p['name']\) for p in d['starters']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Barcelona:', d['formation'], len\(d['starters']\), 'starters'\); [print\(' ', p['role'], p['name']\) for p in d['starters']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c['code'], c['name']\) for c in d]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Formation:', d['formation']\); [print\(' ', p['role'], p['name']\) for p in d['starters']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('West Ham formation:', d['formation'], len\(d['starters']\), 'starters'\); [print\(' ', p['role'], p['name']\) for p in d['starters']]")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const t=JSON.parse\(d\); t.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.id,x.name\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const all=[...\(r.starters||[]\),...\(r.bench||[]\)]; const wp=all.filter\(p=>p.photo\); const np=all.filter\(p=>!p.photo\); console.log\('Barcelona - Total:',all.length,'With photo:',wp.length,'No photo:',np.length\); np.forEach\(p=>console.log\(' -',p.name\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const all=[...\(r.starters||[]\),...\(r.bench||[]\)]; const wp=all.filter\(p=>p.photo\); const np=all.filter\(p=>!p.photo\); console.log\('Real Madrid - Total:',all.length,'With photo:',wp.length,'No photo:',np.length\); np.forEach\(p=>console.log\(' -',p.name\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const all=[...\(r.starters||[]\),...\(r.bench||[]\)]; console.log\('displayed:',all.length,'starters:',r.starters?.length,'bench:',r.bench?.length\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const t=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t.slice\(0,5\).map\(x=>\({id:x.id,name:x.name}\)\)\)\); }\)")
